note: Filed from MPI-300 close-out. The new Input_* reachability check in validate-injection-rules.mjs found wan22_i2v_stage2.json's Input_Seed (node 717) orphaned with sampler 733 baked to noise_seed 0; the wan22_t2v_stage2 twin has the correct 717->733 link. Fix belongs in the wan22_i2v TEMPLATE (stage-2 files are baked by orchestrate.py), is a USER graph edit, and is verified by re-running the validator.

Closed as NOT A BUG. Sampler 733 has add_noise:False in both the i2v and t2v twins, so noise_seed is a dead input and the baked 0 changes nothing; the t2v 717->733 link is inert too, not a reference fix. Stage 2 refines stage 1's near-final latent — all variance comes from stage 1's seed (wired); only a LoRA change moves stage-2 output. No graph edit, no template change. Remaining residue is a validate-injection-rules.mjs false positive on the orphan Input_Seed.

summary: Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-303/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
